sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Know-It-All
feat.text: When you succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge, you gain additional information or context. When you critically succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge, you get additional information or context or can ask an additional follow-up question (the GM chooses which).

traits.name: Bard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the bard class.

traits.name: Thaumaturge
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the thaumaturge class.

archetype.name: Oatia Skysage
archetype.note: This archetype offers Know-It-All at a different level than displayed here.
